name: research-exec
description: Documentation & Strategy Hub for GitHub Portfolio Analysis

scripts.analyze: npm run data:collect && npm run data:analyze
scripts.check-links: npx markdown-link-check --quiet --json README.md | node -e "const result = JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync(0, 'utf-8')); const dead = result.filter(l => l.status === 'dead'); console.log(dead.length ? '❌ ' + dead.length + ' broken links found' : '✅ All links valid'); dead.forEach(l => console.log('   - ' + l.link));"
